channel.title: Python on Foldable Robotics
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Foldable Robotics

item.title: Advanced Data Types
item.description: Advanced Data Types Tuples tup1 = (0,1) tup1 (0, 1) tup2 = (3,-2) tup2 (3, -2) tup3 = tuple(range(5)) tup3 (0, 1, 2, 3, 4) tuple of tuples

item.title: Basic Data Types
item.description: Basic Data Types type(4.1) float type(int(4.1)) int Bool True True False False 1==2 False 3!

item.title: Download and Link to Python Packages
item.description: Download and Link to Python Packages Say you want to run a python package from source using a git repository.

item.title: Google Colab Documentation
item.description: Google Colab Documentation Contributed by Mason Smith EGR 557 - Foldable Robotics

item.title: Installing Anaconda
item.description: Installing Anaconda Introduction Anaconda is a distribution of Python that includes the ability to manage packages using the conda package manager as well as the ability to create and manage environments, or collections of packages that work together.

item.title: Intro to Python
item.description: Intro to Python One thing I really like about python is that it is based on good programming practice .

item.title: Operators & Operations
item.description: Operators & Operations Basic Operators a = 3 b = 2 c = 0b110011 d = 0x3ab1 a 3 b 2 c 51 d 15025 a+b 5 a-b 1 a*b 6 a**b 9 a%b 1 a/b 1.

item.title: Packages in Python
item.description: Packages in Python Introduction The most important packages that I use when creating python code are those packages which make a python more Matlab-like.

item.title: Plotting in 3D
item.description: %matplotlib inline Plotting in 3D Visit this matplotlib tutorial on 3d Plotting Another useful reference import matplotlib.

item.title: Python Development
item.description: Python Development Now What? More Python Making your programs for others Releasing your code Licensing Collaborating Testing / Building Imports Imports should always be written at the top of the file, after any module comments and docstrings.

item.title: Sympy Example
item.description: import sympy a = sympy.Symbol('a') b = sympy.Symbol('b') x = sympy.

item.title: Updating Python Packages
item.description: Updating Python Packages There are several Python packages that are in active development for the purposes of this class.

item.title: Using Jupyter Notebook
item.description: Using Jupyter Notebook About Jupyter Jupyter notebook is a useful browser-based IPython editor that provides inline documentation via markdown and inline plotting functionality for a one-stop-shop coding and documentation experience.
